---
name: Bug report
about: Something went wrong with transcription, diarization, or the CLI/skill
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
<!-- A clear description of the bug. -->

**Command / how you invoked it**
```
# e.g. bash scripts/transcribe.sh meeting.mp4 --speakers 3
```

**Expected**
<!-- What you expected instead. -->

**Environment**
- Chip / RAM: <!-- e.g. M3, 16 GB -->
- OS: <!-- macOS 14.x / Linux -->
- scriba commit: <!-- git rev-parse --short HEAD -->
- Agent (if any): <!-- Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / plain CLI -->

**Logs**
<!-- If it failed, paste the tail of <stem>.transcript.log (kept on failure).
     ⚠️ Do NOT paste private meeting content — redact transcript text. -->
```
```
